title: astragalus ammophilus subsp. persepolitanus
intro: Astragalus ammophilus subsp. persepolitanus, also known as the Persian astragalus, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Persian astragalus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
